summary: Phase 3 Enhanced Accounting Operations - All Backend Tests Pass (25/25), Frontend UI Fully Functional. Tested: Customer Matching, Sync Queue (job-based), Auto-Sync Rules Engine, Enhanced Dashboard with 6 KPIs.
critical_code_review_comments: Customer Matching Service (customer_matching_service.py): Implements match_customer with VKN->TCKN->email->phone priority, VKN uniqueness enforced per tenant+provider
Sync Queue Service (sync_queue_service.py): Queue-based sync with accounting_sync_jobs collection, retry backoff (5m/15m/1h/6h/24h), max 5 attempts
Auto Sync Rules (auto_sync_rules_service.py): Rule engine with trigger_event support (invoice_issued/invoice_approved/manual_trigger), CRUD operations
Background Scheduler (accounting_scheduler.py): process_retry_queue and poll_sync_status for background job processing
API Router (accounting_sync.py): 15+ endpoints for dashboard, customers, rules, sync jobs - all tested and working
MOCKED: Luca accounting provider operates in SIMULATION mode - returns simulated responses with LUCA-xxx refs

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Dashboard, Tabs, Rules Panel, Customers Panel, Settings all working)

seed_data_creation: Backend tests create TEST_ prefixed customers and rules for isolated testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 3 Enhanced Accounting fully tested. New features: 1) Customer Matching - POST /api/accounting/customers/create enforces VKN uniqueness, /match supports VKN/TCKN/email/phone, /get-or-create auto-creates. 2) Sync Queue - GET /api/accounting/sync-jobs lists jobs, POST /api/accounting/retry uses job_id (not sync_id), backoff retry scheduling. 3) Auto-Sync Rules - CRUD at /api/accounting/rules, triggers: invoice_issued/invoice_approved/manual_trigger. 4) Enhanced Dashboard - /api/accounting/dashboard returns customer_stats, active_rules, queue stats (synced/failed/pending/retrying).

backend_apis.GET /api/accounting/dashboard: PASS - Returns customer_stats (total_customers, unmatched_count, by_match_method), active_rules, total_rules, queue stats (synced, failed, pending, retrying)
backend_apis.GET /api/accounting/sync-jobs: PASS - Lists sync jobs with status/provider filters
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/sync/{invoice_id}: PASS - Queue-based sync returns job_id and status
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/retry: PASS - Uses job_id, returns 400 for non-existent
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/customers/create: PASS - Creates customer, enforces VKN uniqueness (400 on duplicate)
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/customers/match: PASS - Matches by VKN/TCKN/email/phone, returns matched=true/false
backend_apis.GET /api/accounting/customers: PASS - Lists customers with search filter
backend_apis.PUT /api/accounting/customers/{id}: PASS - Updates customer (manual override), 404 for non-existent
backend_apis.POST /api/accounting/rules: PASS - Creates rule, 400 for invalid trigger
backend_apis.PUT /api/accounting/rules/{id}: PASS - Updates rule (enable/disable toggle), 404 for non-existent

frontend_ui.Dashboard 6 KPI cards: PASS - Basarili Sync, Basarisiz, Bekleyen, Yeniden Deneme, Cariler (with unmatched count), Luca status
frontend_ui.3 tabs (Genel Bakis, Otomasyon, Cariler): PASS - All tabs navigable and functional
frontend_ui.Sync Jobs Table: PASS - Shows JOB ID, FATURA, DURUM, REF, DENEME, SONRAKI, HATA, AKSIYON columns
frontend_ui.Auto-Sync Rules Panel: PASS - Shows rules with toggle/delete, + Kural Ekle button opens form
frontend_ui.Rule Creation Form: PASS - Rule name input, trigger select, approval checkbox, save button
frontend_ui.Customer Panel: PASS - Table with MUSTERI, VKN/TCKN, EMAIL, ESLEME, EXT.ID columns
frontend_ui.Settings Panel: PASS - Muhasebe Entegrator Ayarlari with Luca provider config

mocked_apis.luca_provider: SIMULATION MODE - Luca accounting adapter cannot reach real API, returns simulated success responses with LUCA-xxx external refs
